title: NeoMods
description: this is a very optimized modpack that can boost your fps from 20-240 and its for pvp and it has good shaders this pack is for all types of player by NeoWolfy discord id- neowolfyofficial you can contact for any problem
body:
NeoClient is a performance-focused Fabric optimization modpack for Minecraft, built to deliver smoother gameplay, higher FPS, and improved stability without changing the vanilla experience. It is designed for players who want Minecraft to run faster and more efficiently while keeping mechanics, progression, and visuals familiar.

NeoClient uses a carefully selected set of lightweight and well-maintained optimization mods that enhance rendering, chunk loading, lighting calculations, entity processing, and memory management. These improvements reduce lag spikes, shorten loading times, and provide more consistent frame rates during exploration, combat, and large builds.

The modpack does not add new blocks, items, or gameplay features. Every optimization runs quietly in the background, ensuring full compatibility with vanilla worlds, servers, and most Fabric-based mods. All configurations are pre-tuned to balance performance and visual quality, so no manual setup is required after installation.

NeoClient is ideal for laptops, low-end PCs, and systems with integrated graphics, while also benefiting higher-end hardware by improving overall smoothness and responsiveness. Whether you play survival, multiplayer, or creative, NeoClient provides a clean, fast, and reliable Minecraft experience from the moment you launch the game.
